label: Gender
description: GN-level population disaggregated by sex (male, female).

label: Ethnicity
description: GN-level population by ethnic group (Sinhalese, Sri Lanka Tamil, Indian Tamil, Moor, Burgher, Malay, Chetty, Bharatha, Veddha, other).

label: Religion
description: GN-level population by religion (Buddhist, Hindu, Islam, Roman Catholic, other Christian, other).

label: AgeGroup
description: GN-level population by five-year age groups from 00–04 up to 95 and above.

label: Structure
description: Occupied housing units by building structure type (single/attached houses by storey count, other).

label: Walls
description: Occupied housing units by wall construction material (bricks, cement block, cabook, mud, cadjan, sheets, other).

label: Floor
description: Occupied housing units by floor material (cement, terrazzo/tile, concrete, mud, wood, sand, other).

label: Roof
description: Occupied housing units by roof material (tile, asbestos, concrete, metal sheet, cadjan/straw, other).

label: Water
description: Households by principal drinking water source (wells, tube well, pipe-borne, bottled, RO filter, bowser, other).

label: Fuel
description: Households by principal cooking fuel (firewood, kerosene, gas, electricity, sawdust, bio-gas, other).

label: Lighting
description: Households by principal lighting source (grid electricity, kerosene lamp, solar, bio-gas, generator, other).

label: Toilet
description: Households by toilet facility type and exclusivity (within unit/premises, shared, common/public, none).
